source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage Crane Other Lifting

actions_taken: Operators grabbed nearby handheld fire extinguisher and extinguished flame in under a minute
Pipeline pump taken out of service
Incident reported to BSEE at 17:05 hours on 22 December 2020
Photographs provided to BSEE on 23 December 2020
Root Cause Analysis conducted by Cox HSE coordinator
event.summary: On 22 December 2020 at 15:30 hours, a small fire occurred at Viosca Knoll (VK) 900 Platform A production platform operated by Cox Operating, LLC. A flame was noticed on the pipeline pump's exhaust insulation. Operators extinguished the fire using a handheld fire extinguisher in under a minute. The root cause was a 6 to 8 inch crack in the expansion joint that allowed hot exhaust to contact the engine's left bank air filter housing, causing a plastic dust cover to melt and drip onto the exhaust blanket, resulting in a small flame. No injuries, pollution, or property damage occurred. One pipeline was taken out of service.
recommendations: Incorporate more frequent and thorough inspection of expansion joints and equipment to identify flaws before escalation
Look into the possibility of finding a dust cover that can withstand higher temperatures than previous and current plastic dust covers

hazards.name: Hot exhaust from pipeline pump engine
Combustible plastic materials in air filter housing
Thermal cycling stress on expansion joint

threats.name: Hot exhaust escaping through cracked expansion joint
Plastic dust cover melting and dripping onto exhaust blanket

consequences.name: Small fire on pipeline pump exhaust insulation

controls.name: Expansion joint design and material selection
controls.barrier_role: Prevent crack formation in expansion joint
controls.lod_basis: Primary engineering control to prevent hot exhaust escape

supporting_text: failure occurred from a 6 to 8 inch crack on the expansion joint
Over time, the expansion joint may have cycled through hot and cool conditions such that it cracked due to fatigue

controls.name: Air filter housing dust cover material specification
controls.barrier_role: Prevent plastic dust cover from melting and igniting
controls.lod_basis: Secondary engineering control to prevent ignition source creation

supporting_text: A plastic dust cover located inside the air filter's access hatch began to melt
the plastic dripped out of the filter housing onto the exhaust blanket which resulted in a small flame

controls.name: Routine inspection of expansion joints and equipment
controls.barrier_role: Detect expansion joint cracks before they cause hot exhaust escape
controls.lod_basis: Administrative control to detect equipment degradation

supporting_text: BSEE NOD recommends incorporating a more frequent and thorough inspection of expansion joints and equipment to help identify these flaws in equipment before they escalate into something more severe

controls.name: Operator rounds and visual inspection
controls.barrier_role: Detect incipient fire during routine operations
controls.lod_basis: First line of defense to detect and respond to fire

supporting_text: while operators were making their rounds, a small flame was noticed on the pipeline pump's exhaust insulation

controls.name: Handheld fire extinguisher availability and accessibility
controls.lod_basis: First line of defense to suppress fire

supporting_text: operators grabbed a nearby handheld fire extinguisher and extinguished the flame in under a minute
The fire extinguisher was in working order and its inspection was up-to-date
The location of the fire extinguisher was close enough to fight an incipient fire

controls.name: Pipeline pump shutdown procedure
controls.barrier_role: Prevent further escalation of fire after detection

supporting_text: the pipeline pump was properly shut down to prevent further escalation
The pipeline pump was taken OOS

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
